free_text: A study of the Nb-93 levels populated via
the (n,n'g) reaction
Last author
Graphics only
Natural Nb in the form of a hollow cylinder with inside
and outside diameters of 1.9, 2.54 cm and 5.0 cm long
For 846.8keV level
In: Nuclear research with low energy accelators,p.167,
edt. by J.B.Marion and D.M.van Patter.NY:
Acad.Press Inc.1967
FWHM-3keV at a gamma-ray energy 1 MeV
No corrections were applied for neutron flux
attenuation, multiple scattering due to negligibly
small values
Nothing said about errors, except that
data does not include the 8% uncertainty in
cross-section of the standard reaction, and:
Energy dependance of the detector efficiency,
gamma-ray attenuation, effect of the time-gate
detector efficiency 4%
Data were received from author and description
was taken from Z.Physik,260(1984)9
VG
HW.-Superfluous reaction code removed in
subentries 002 - 018
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Reference on monitor, COMMON section in Subent 001 and
other additional information was added.
